csv.Split(new char[]{';'}, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries).Select(x => x.Split(','))
                .Select(x => new PackageSpecifier(x[0].Trim(), x.Length == 1 ? VersionSpecifier.AnyRelease : VersionSpecifier.Parse(x[1].Trim())))
                .ToArray

AllPackages.Where(p => p.Name == package.Name)
                .Where(p => p.IsPlatformCompatible(package.Architecture, package.OS))
                              .GroupBy(p => p.Version)
                              .OrderByDescending(g => g.Key).ToList
